steps.title: Use the rectangle perimeter formula
steps.content: A rectangle's perimeter is the sum of all four sides. This rectangle has two sides of length $7$ and two sides of width $10$, so add all four side lengths or use $P=2l+2w$.

steps.title: Recall the perimeter formula
steps.content: The perimeter of a rectangle is the sum of all four sides. Since a rectangle has two sides of length $l$ and two sides of width $w$, the perimeter is $2l + 2w$.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $l = 7$ and $w = 10$ into the formula:
$$P = 2(7) + 2(10) = 14 + 20 = 34$$
That matches Choice D — $34$.
